limitations: This report was generated from deterministic JSON without calling OpenAI.
The public JSON mainly preserves the final run, so intermediate intraday execution history cannot be fully reconstructed.
No operational-calibration JSON was available for this date, so calibration-layer activity could not be directly verified.

executiveSummary.headline: TEPCO was more accurate for the day.
executiveSummary.summary: 24 comparable hours were available. Model MAE was 467.5 MW, TEPCO MAE was 311.7 MW. WAPE was 1.94% for the model and 1.30% for TEPCO.

rootCauseHypotheses.title: Daily error was higher than TEPCO.
rootCauseHypotheses.explanation: TEPCO was closer by daily MAE/WAPE. Review the detailed hour bands and internal features together.

rootCauseHypotheses.title: Late-afternoon demand persistence may have been underestimated.
rootCauseHypotheses.explanation: Demand stayed higher than forecast in late afternoon. Review temperature direction and late-business-hour interactions.

rootCauseHypotheses.title: A large single-hour miss occurred.
rootCauseHypotheses.explanation: The max-error hour had a large impact on daily metrics. Inspect lag, weather, and calibration metadata for that hour first.

rootCauseHypotheses.title: Actual peak level was underestimated.
rootCauseHypotheses.explanation: At the actual peak hour, the model forecast was low. Check cooling/heating load and same-business-type anchors.

rootCauseHypotheses.title: Weather change and model bias overlapped in the 16-18 band.
rootCauseHypotheses.explanation: The direction of temperature/cooling-load change aligned with model bias in this band, making it a candidate for weather-sensitivity review.

featureRecommendations.suggestion: Review the impact of lag_24h based on the hypothesis: Daily error was higher than TEPCO.
featureRecommendations.expectedEffect: Check whether MAE, WAPE, and RMSE improve together under repeated hour-band and business-type conditions.
featureRecommendations.risk: Overfitting a single-day pattern can cause over-correction in other seasons or day types.
featureRecommendations.validationPlan: Compare WAPE, RMSE, and max error against TEPCO using recent 2-4 week replay and backtests.
